title: Celebrating McCarthy Tétrault Alumni George S. Takach’s New Book: Cold War 2.0
content:
## Celebrating McCarthy Tétrault Alumni George S. Takach’s New Book: Cold War 2.0
Please join us on Monday, March 4, 2024 where Ontario Regional Managing Partner, Caroline Zayid , will have a compelling conversation with recently retired McCarthy Tétrault partner George S. Takach about his new book, Cold War 2.0: Artificial Intelligence in the New Battle Between China, Russia and America.
The book discusses the new technology-infused global geopolitics that all business executives and lawyers need to understand if they are to navigate risk - and attain reward - in a bold new world. Following their conversation, there will be an opportunity for audience questions, both about the book and George’s post-retirement career journey. The discussion will be followed by a networking reception and celebration.
More information on the book can be found at Simon & Schuster.com . Each attendee will receive a copy of George’s book.
For questions about this seminar or to request an invitation please contact torontoevents@mccarthy.ca .
This program is eligible for up to 1 Substantive Hour under the Law Society of Ontario’s mandatory CPD Regime.
Time: 5:00 p.m. - Welcome reception 5:30 p.m. - Program starts 6:30 p.m. - Reception
- Caroline Zayid Partner People.Offices.Singular Toronto
